svg.title: E-commerce microservices — main request flow
svg.desc: Left-to-right architecture showing client, API gateway, three core services, databases, and the Kafka event bus with notification service.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What kind of client does this system support?')
sendPrompt('What does the API Gateway do on port 8222?')
sendPrompt('What does the Order Service do on port 8070?')
sendPrompt('What does the Product Service do on port 8050?')
sendPrompt('What does the Customer Service do on port 8090?')
sendPrompt('What does the Payment Service do on port 8060?')
sendPrompt('What events does Kafka carry on port 9092?')
sendPrompt('What does the Notification Service do on port 8040?')
sendPrompt('What is MailDev used for on port 1080?')
